name: compensationBenchmark
_note: LENS_ACTIONS handler (server/domains/hr.js). 3-arg dispatch via /api/lens/run on key 'hr.compensationBenchmark'. HrActionPanel sends FLAT { role, location } and renders r.result.{role,market50,market75,rangeLow,rangeHigh,offerSuggestion} ($k). Deterministic pure compute: a role-keyword median seed scaled by a location cost-of-labor multiplier; p75 = +18%, range ±22%, offer = midpoint(median,p75). Was DEAD before the 2026-06-28 alignment fix (handler read data.salary/yearsExperience and returned benchmarkSalary/percentile — every comp card blank). Not driven by macro-assassin (lives in LENS_ACTIONS, not MACROS); pinned by server/tests/hr-lens-macros.test.js.
